description: Code quality, UX polish, page titles check, cache logic review, documentation update (README, CHANGELOG)
steps: 1. In dashboard/app.py, verify the /api/market-overview caching logic is correct. Currently it uses a custom TTL offset (_CACHE_TTL - 60 = 120s effective). This is fine but ensure that force_refresh=true actually bypasses the cache properly (it does via the if not force_refresh check).

2. Check all page <title> tags across templates: index.html should be 'Augur - 多智能体投资分析仪表盘', stocks.html should be '股票分析 - Augur', personas.html should be '投资人系统 - Augur', settings.html should be '设置 - Augur', backtest.html should be '历史回测 - Augur', signals.html should be '信号监控 - Augur'. Fix any that are inconsistent.
3. Update README.md: add a v7.3.1 entry in the quick features section mentioning the new dashboard panels (Hot Tickers, Fear & Greed, Macro Snapshot, investor style tags). Keep brief.
4. Update README_EN.md: same v7.3.1 entry in English.

5. Update docs/CHANGELOG.md: add v7.3.1 section at top with Dashboard Enhancement (hot tickers, fear & greed, macro snapshot), Report Visualization (style tags, key metrics panel, print styles, copy link), and UX Polish (section reorder, version bump) categories.
6. Commit all changes to main with Chinese commit message: 'feat: v7.3.1 Dashboard数据密度提升/报告可视化深化/UX优化'
acceptance_criteria: All page titles are consistent and descriptive
README.md and README_EN.md mention v7.3.1 features
A git commit exists on main with all changes
